name: Scandinavian Cucumbers
recipeIngredient: 3 small Unpeeled cucumbers, thinly sliced (approximately 3 cups total)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together sour cream, parsley, vinegar, sugar, and chives in a large bowl.
2. Gently fold in the thinly sliced cucumbers.
3. Cover the mixture with plastic wrap or transfer to an airtight container.
4. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
